# Reference

One record per `grove` command (`grove <namespace> <verb>`), as a queryable table — the same data
the AI's system prompt is generated from. Try:

- `mutates = true` — every command that changes the space.
- `namespace = records` — the record verbs.

Each command exists at every [[concepts/the-five-faces|face]] (JS, CLI, MCP, HTTP, FE); the body
shows the CLI form.

## Data

| Record | namespace | verb | mutates |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [ai prompt](ai-prompt.md) | ai | prompt | false |
| [change commit](change-commit.md) | change | commit | true |
| [collections create](collections-create.md) | collections | create | true |
| [collections tree](collections-tree.md) | collections | tree | false |
| [ingest run](ingest-run.md) | ingest | run | true |
| [links of](links-of.md) | links | of | false |
| [query run](query-run.md) | query | run | false |
| [records create](records-create.md) | records | create | true |
| [records promote](records-promote.md) | records | promote | true |
| [records read](records-read.md) | records | read | false |
| [search run](search-run.md) | search | run | false |
